title: The Next Threat Emerges
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is the next threat emerges.
scene: The scene focuses on the next threat emerges, with Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahh! That's right, that it is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: All those in favor of quitting!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But that number won't be increasing anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's the culprit here! Don't praise him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: PLEASE STOP!! SMO-YAN IS GONNA DIE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And then law, and Straw Hat too!!

summary: The Next Threat Emerges. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
